Class ReferenceApi

java.lang.Object
com.sait.workshop05.api.ReferenceApi
public final class ReferenceApi extends Object
Loads reference data for admin screens (customers, bakeries, addresses, catalog).

  • Method Details

    • invalidateCustomersCache

      public static void invalidateCustomersCache()
      Clears the in-memory customer list cache. Call after customer create/update so other screens see fresh names and balances on their next load.

    • invalidateAddressesCache

      public static void invalidateAddressesCache()
      Clears cached address rows (e.g. after creating an address).

    • loadAdminUsers

      public static List<UserOption> loadAdminUsers() throws Exception

      Exception

    • fetchAdminUserSummaries

      public static List<ReferenceApi.UserSummaryJson> fetchAdminUserSummaries() throws Exception
      Full user list for admin. Role filters happen in callers for employee views.
      Throws:
      Exception
